summary: Matched the remaining Sheik down-special transform entry functions in ftSk_SpecialLw.c. The PR replaced the empty grounded enter stub and the aerial nonmatching marker with C implementations for ftSk_SpecialLw_Enter and ftSk_SpecialAirLw_Enter, using shared motion-state setup, velocity scaling from ftSeakAttributes, TopN joint position lookup, effect/helper call setup, and accessory callback assignment.

key_files.reason: Only changed file; implements the remaining Sheik Transform grounded and aerial enter functions and adjusts local constant types/includes needed for the match.

what_changed: Added includes for lb/lb_00B0.h and lb/lb_00F9.h to support calls to lb_8000B1CC and lb_800119DC.
Changed three local static constants from float const to f32 const: ftSk_Init_804D9698, ftSk_Init_804D969C, and ftSk_Init_804D96A0.
Implemented ftSk_SpecialAirLw_Enter for Sheik_AS_363_Transform_Aerial, replacing the nonmatching marker.

Both enter functions call Fighter_ChangeMotionState with transform action states, call ftAnim_8006EBA4, reset fp->cmd_vars[0], scale self and ground velocity by ftSeakAttributes fields x60/x64, read the TopN joint position with lb_8000B1CC, call lb_800119DC with constants and argument 0x78, and assign fp->accessory4_cb to fn_80114034.
Grounded enter uses motion state 0x169; aerial enter uses motion state 0x16B.
smart_moves: The grounded and aerial implementations preserve the same operation order, which is often critical for matching and for reproducing shared action-state initialization behavior.
The implementation retrieves fp and dat_attrs after Fighter_ChangeMotionState and ftAnim_8006EBA4, matching the apparent original sequencing rather than hoisting accesses early.
Velocity scaling uses ftSeakAttributes fields directly: self_vel.x and gr_vel divide by x60, while self_vel.y divides by x64.
The code uses fp->parts[FtPart_TopN].joint with lb_8000B1CC to derive the position passed into lb_800119DC, avoiding a guessed or manually constructed position.
The explicit unused stack padding declaration, u8 _[16], is a matching tactic to preserve stack layout in these functions.
decomp_lessons: For similar fighter special-move enter functions, look for paired grounded/aerial action states with nearly identical initialization bodies and only motion-state IDs differing.
Action-state enter matches may require exact sequencing around Fighter_ChangeMotionState, ftAnim_8006EBA4, GET_FIGHTER, and attribute-derived velocity updates.
When an effect or helper needs the fighter's model position, use the TopN joint and existing lb position helper calls rather than inventing a separate coordinate source.
Local constant type spelling can matter for matching; this PR normalized several static float constants to f32 const.
Stack-shaping dummy arrays can be necessary in small fighter enter functions, especially when local Vec3 stack placement affects generated code.
naming_conventions: Sheik down-special source remains under ftSk_SpecialLw.c, using the ftSk_ prefix for Sheik functions.
Grounded and aerial enter functions are named ftSk_SpecialLw_Enter and ftSk_SpecialAirLw_Enter.
Comments identify corresponding action-state names: Sheik_AS_361_Transform_Grounded and Sheik_AS_363_Transform_Aerial.
File-local rodata constants retain auto-style names such as ftSk_Init_804D9698, ftSk_Init_804D969C, ftSk_Init_804D96A0, ftSk_Init_804D96A4, and ftSk_Init_804D96A8.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Use f32 const rather than float const where the target expects project typedef spelling or matching type behavior.
Preserve local stack variables Vec3 sp20 and u8 _[16] to influence stack layout.
Cast HSD_GObj* to Fighter_GObj* for Fighter_ChangeMotionState and ftAnim_8006EBA4 calls.
Use numeric action-state IDs 0x169 and 0x16B rather than introducing new enum names in this patch.
Pass 0U flags and the existing zero/speed constants ftSk_Init_804D96A4 and ftSk_Init_804D96A8 into Fighter_ChangeMotionState.
Call lb_800119DC(&sp20, 0x78, ftSk_Init_804D9698, ftSk_Init_804D969C, ftSk_Init_804D96A0) after filling sp20 from TopN joint position.
review_feedback: No review comments were present in the provided PR slice.
The PR context reports one issue comment, but no comment body was included in the excerpt, so no reviewer intent or requested changes can be extracted.
follow_up_queries: Find other Sheik or Zelda transform enter functions that use lb_8000B1CC followed by lb_800119DC.
Compare ftSk_SpecialLw_Enter and ftSk_SpecialAirLw_Enter against ftZd_SpecialLw transform enter implementations for shared abstractions or naming cleanup.
Search for remaining ftSk_SpecialLw.c nonmatching markers after PR 1699.
Check whether action-state IDs 0x169 and 0x16B have enum names available in headers for future readability-only refactors.
